title: Sanders proposes $4.4 trillion tax on billionaires
author: Alexander Bolton
fullText: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) has teamed up with Rep. Ro Khanna (D-Calif.) to propose a 5 percent annual wealth tax on the nation’s billionaires that would raise an estimated $4.4 trillion over the next decade to help “working families” cope with higher living costs. The tax hike would apply to 938 billionaires in the U.S.,…
